action: Compose a report-only continuity inventory that normalizes supplied M-* records, validates inherited unresolved claims, and preserves historical forks as evidence.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-012 explicitly handed off a report-only inventory that composes the loader, inherited-unresolved invariant, and fork detector.

unresolved_inherited: repository-wide discovery of every M-* record
classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims
resolved_claims: report-only inventory composition over supplied continuity queue entries

progress.memory: Continuity validity and historical linearity are different properties. A report must expose forks, malformed records, missing dependencies, and dropped unresolved claims without collapsing branches or requiring a single historical head.
progress.verification: Four deterministic checks passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source and test content.

claim_states.observed: The composer reuses the committed queue loader, inherited-unresolved validator, and fork detector and emits a non-destructive report.
claim_states.inferred: Separating report validity from single-head linearity prevents reconciled histories from erasing evidence of earlier divergence.
claim_states.proposed: Add automatic repository path discovery and run this inventory over all operations/queue-updates/M-*.json records.
claim_states.superseded: Requiring one current head as proof that historical queue lineage was linear.
unresolved: repository-wide automatic discovery of every M-* queue record
classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, abstract decision structure, and synthetic test records only. Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
handoff: Add repository path discovery, generate an inventory over every committed M-* queue update, and commit the resulting report without modifying or deleting historical records.
